subcodes.first_line: O thou martyr, son of the martyr! Through the mighty confirmations of the Divine Unity and the lights of heavenly bounties [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الشهید ابن الشهید از آثار تاییدات عظیمه حضرت احدیت و انوار فیوضات
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @martyrs and martyrdom, @Hands of the Cause
